title: BABY PROMISE - 211info
text: REDMOND CHILD CARE RESOURCES BABY PROMISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers full-day quality care and education for eligible children in local early care and education settings. Families must be eligible for and approved for the Employment Related Day Care (ERDC) program to be enrolled in Baby Promise. 2363 SW Glacier Place Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Children ages 6 weeks to 3 years. Parents must live or work in Deschutes, Crook, or Jefferson County, and be currently employed or attending school and be enrolled in or eligible for Employment-Related Day Care (ERDC). Household income must be at or below 200% of the Federal Poverty Level. Placement in a Baby Promise slot is an exemption to the ERDC waitlist. Regional Baby Promise enrollment partners will collaborate with families and approved Baby Promise providers to identify the family’s needs and the regional Baby Promise slots available that meet those needs. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 419-0057 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 419-0057 Baby Promise Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information or to apply. Email with additional questions. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address, proof of income, photo ID LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties and the Confederated Tribes of Warm Springs Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * Infants/Toddlers Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILD CARE RESOURCES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
